not-first:mt-6">Primary use for this API is to integrate our embeds into your own applications whilst also being able to present your own live score data.</p>
<h2 class="mt-10 scroll-m-20 border-b pb-1 text-3xl font-semibold tracking-tight first:mt-0" id="endpoints"><a class="font-medium underline underline-offset-4 subheading-anchor" aria-label="Link to section" href="#endpoints"><span class="icon icon-link"></span></a>Endpoints</h2>
<p class="leading-7 not-first:mt-6">The API has the following endpoints:</p>
<ul class="my-6 ml-6 list-disc">
<li class="mt-2">
<p class="leading-7 not-first:mt-6"><code class="relative rounded-sm px-[0.3rem] py-[0.2rem] font-mono text-sm">/api/v1/matches/[sport] [?date=2025-01-01]</code>: This endpoint allows you to get the matches available to watch for a specific sport.</p>
</li>
<li class="mt-2">
<p class="leading-7 not-first:mt-6"><code class="relative rounded-sm px-[0.3rem] py-[0.2rem] font-mono text-sm">/api/v1/matches/live [?date=2025-01-01]</code>: This endpoint allows you to get the live matches available to watch.</p>
</li>
<li class="mt-2">
<p class="leading-7 not-first:mt-6"><code class="relative rounded-sm px-[0.3rem] py-[0.2rem] font-mono text-sm">/api/v1/matches/[sport]/popular [?date=2025-01-01]</code>: This endpoint allows you to get the popular matches for a specific sport.</p>
</li>
<li class="mt-2">
<p class="leading-7 not-first:mt-6"><code class="relative rounded-sm px-[0.3rem] py-[0.2rem] font-mono text-sm">/api/v1/matches/[sport]/live [?date=2025-01-01]</code>: This endpoint allows you to get the live matches for a specific sport.</p>
</li>
<li class="mt-2">
<p class="leading-7 not-first:mt-6"><code class="relative rounded-sm px-[0.3rem] py-[0.2rem] font-mono text-sm">/api/v1/matches/popular [?date=2025-01-01]</code>: This endpoint allows you to get the popular matches across all sports.</p>
</li>
<li class="mt-2">
<p class="leading-7 not-first:mt-6"><code class="relative rounded-sm px-[0.3rem] py-[0.2rem] font-mono text-sm">/api/v1/matches/popular/live [?date=2025-01-01]</code>: This endpoint allows you to get the popular live matches across all sports.</p>
</li>
<li class="mt-2">
<p class="leading-7 not-first:mt-6"><code class="relative rounded-sm px-[0.3rem] py-[0.2rem] font-mono text-sm">/api/v1/matches/all [?date=2025-01-01]</code>: This endpoint allows you to get all matches across all sports.</p>
</li>
<li class="mt-2">
<p class="leading-7 not-first:mt-6"><code class="relative rounded-sm px-[0.3rem] py-[0.2rem] font-mono text-sm">/api/v1/matches/all/live [?date=2025-01-01]</code>: This endpoint allows you to get all live matches across all sports.</p>
</li>
<li class="mt-2">
<p class="leading-7 not-first:mt-6"><code class="relative rounded-sm px-[0.3rem] py-[0.2rem] font-mono text-sm">/api/v1/matches/all/popular [?date=2025-01-01]</code>: This endpoint allows you to get all popular matches across all sports.</p>
</li>
<li class="mt-2">
<p class="leading-7 not-first:mt-6"><code class="relative rounded-sm px-[0.3rem] py-[0.2rem] font-mono text-sm">/api/v1/matches/all/popular/live [?date=2025-01-01]</code>: This endpoint allows you to get all popular live matches across all sports.</p>
</li>
<li class="mt-2">
<p class="leading-7 not-first:mt-6"><code class="relative rounded-sm px-[0.3rem] py-[0.2rem] font-mono text-sm">/api/v1/match/[id]</code>: This endpoint allows you to get the details for a match.</p>
</li>
<li class="mt-2">
<p class="leading-7 not-first:mt-6"><code class="relative rounded-sm px-[0.3rem] py-[0.2rem] font-mono text-sm">/api/v1/match/[id]/stats</code>: This endpoint allows you to get detailed statistics for a match including boxscore, rosters, and commentary.</p>
</li>
<li class="mt-2">
<p class="leading-7 not-first:mt-6"><code class="relative rounded-sm px-[0.3rem] py-[0.2rem] font-mono text-sm">/api/v1/poster/[id]</code>: This endpoint allows you to get the poster for a match.</p>
</li>
<li class="mt-2">
<p class="leading-7 not-first:mt-6"><code class="relative rounded-sm px-[0.3rem] py-[0.2rem] font-mono text-sm">/api/v1/team-logo/[id]</code>: This endpoint allows you to get the logo for a team.</p>
</li>
<li class="mt-2">
<p class="leading-7 not-first:mt-6"><code class="relative rounded-sm px-[0.3rem] py-[0.2rem] font-mono text-sm">/api/v1/league-logo/[id]</code>: This endpoint allows you to get the logo for a league.</p>
</li>
<li class="mt-2">
<p class="leading-7 not-first:mt-6"><code class="relative rounded-sm px-[0.3rem] py-[0.2rem] font-mono text-sm">/api/v1/sports</code>: This endpoint allows you to get the sports available to watch.</p>
</li>
<li class="mt-2">
<p class="leading-7 not-first:mt-6"><code class="relative rounded-sm px-[0.3rem] py-[0.2rem] font-mono text-sm">/api/v1/news</code> or <code class="relative rounded-sm px-[0.3rem] py-[0.2rem] font-mono text-sm">/api/v1/news/[sport]</code>: This endpoint allows you to get recent news across all sports or for a specific sport.</p>
</li>
<li class="mt-2">
<p class="leading-7 not-first:mt-6"><code class="relative rounded-sm px-[0.3rem] py-[0.2rem] font-mono text-sm">/api/v1/news/article/[id]</code>: This endpoint allows you to get the full content for a news article.</p>
</li>
<li class="mt-2">
<p class="leading-7 not-first:mt-6"><code class="relative rounded-sm px-[0.3rem] py-[0.2rem] font-mono text-sm">/api/v1/emotes</code>: This endpoint allows you to get the emotes available to use in the chat.</p>
</li>
<li class="mt-2">
<p class="leading-7 not-first:mt-6"><code class="relative rounded-sm px-[0.3rem] py-[0.2rem] font-mono text-sm">/api/v1/top-leagues</code> or <code class="relative rounded-sm px-[0.3rem] py-[0.2rem] font-mono text-sm">/api/v1/top-leagues/[sport]</code>: This endpoint allows you to get the top leagues for all sports or a specific sport.</p>
</li>
<li class="mt-2">
<p class="leading-7 not-first:mt-6"><code class="relative rounded-sm px-[0.3rem] py-[0.2rem] font-mono text-sm">/api/v1/top-teams</code> or <code class="relative rounded-sm px-[0.3rem] py-[0.2rem] font-mono text-sm">/api/v1/top-teams/[sport]</code>: This endpoint allows you to get the top teams for all sports or a specific sport.</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 class="mt-10 scroll-m-20 border-b pb-1 text-3xl font-semibold tracking-tight first:mt-0" id="rules"><a class="font-medium underline underline-offset-4 subheading-anchor" aria-label="Link to section" href="#rules"><span class="icon icon-link"></span></a>Rules</h2>
<ul class="my-6 ml-6 list-disc">
<li class="mt-2">The API has no rate limits but we reserve the right to block abuse (please implement caching).</li>
<li class="mt-2">The embeds can be used for commercial and non-commercial purposes as long as the embeds are <strong>not</strong> altered.</li>
<li class="mt-2">Embeds are allowed to be used on other websites.</li>
<li class="mt-2"><strong>NO</strong> altering the functionality of our embeds. Violators will be forced to sit down and watch an entire WNBA game.</li>
</ul>
<h2 class="mt-10 scroll-m-20 border-b pb-1 text-3xl font-semibold tracking-tight first:mt-0" id="contact-us"><a class="font-medium underline underline-offset-4 subheading-anchor" aria-label="Link to section" href="#contact-us"><span class="icon icon-link"></span></a>Contact Us</h2>
<p class="leading-7 not-first:mt-6">If you have any questions or need assistance with the API, please join our Discord server.</p></div></div><div class="flex flex-row items-center
